title: Postpartum, child and infant health - Canada.ca
content:
## Postpartum, child and infant health
Postpartum health, breastfeeding, parenting, caring for a baby, infant or child, nutrition, safe sleep, celebrating the rights of children.

### Supports and programs
Pregnancy, infant and child health supports and programs in Canada

### Your guide to postpartum health and caring for your baby
Advice on taking care of yourself after giving birth and your new baby

### Parenting tip sheets
Current and accessible information for parents and caregivers of children aged 0 to 5 years on a variety of topics

### COVID-19 resources for parents and children
COVID-19 and advice for caring for children
Breastfeeding, its importance and benefits, getting help, smoking, alcohol and medication use while breastfeeding
Safety  information on baby slings, strollers, bottles and pacifiers, infant nutrition
Bunk  beds, cribs, cradles and bassinets, safe sleep tips, guidelines on children's  sleepwear, sudden infant death syndrome (SIDS)
Deciding to vaccinate, diseases that vaccines prevent, vaccination schedule, tips for the appointment

### Newborn registration and benefits
Programs and services to help you register your baby and get family benefits

### Product and toy safety
Safety information for toys, household products, nursery products and second-hand products
Safety information, preventing injuries at home and outdoors

### Cannabis and parenting
Facts about using cannabis for non-medical purposes while parenting young children
Information on family violence created by the Stop Family Violence program
Early Childhood Tooth Decay, prevent tooth decay, mouth care, baby teeth, adult teeth
National Child Day and the protection of children’s rights in Canada under the United Nations Convention on the Rights of the Child
Childhood obesity, how to encourage healthy eating habits and promote an active lifestyle

### Pregnancy and preconception
Preconception health (health before pregnancy), sexual health, healthy eating, physical activity, mental and oral health during pregnancy

### Mental health during and after pregnancy
Information on treating perinatal mood, anxiety and related disorders

## For health care providers

### Family-Centred Maternity and Newborn Care National Guidelines
Resource about maternal and newborn health. Includes the latest information and advice from Canadian experts

### Immunization in pregnancy and breastfeeding: Canadian Immunization Guide
Official immunization guide for health professionals

### Guidance on Safe Sleep
Joint statement on safe sleep: Reducing Sudden Infant Deaths in Canada provides health practitioners with current evidence-based information

### Guidance on Traumatic Head Injury due to Child Maltreatment (THI-CM)
Outlines the key principles underpinning professional practice in traumatic head injury due to child maltreatment (THI-CM) in Canada

### Nutrition for healthy term infants
Evidence-informed principles and recommendations for infant nutrition in the first 2 years

### Perinatal Health Indicators – Public Health Infobase
Information on maternal, fetal and infant health in Canada based on various data sources

### Protecting, Promoting and Supporting Breastfeeding: A Practical Workbook for Community-Based Programs
Strategies to promote breastfeeding, with a special focus on reaching vulnerable populations

### 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Management of Perinatal Mood, Anxiety and Related Disorders
Comprehensive clinical guidelines on managing mood, anxiety and related disorders during pregnancy and postpartum
